deployment_notes: Treat redesign-v2 as the current website/default branch unless GitHub repository settings are changed.
The public site is static GitHub Pages content served from the docs directory with docs/CNAME set to aliusresearch.org.
On 2026-05-06, unauthenticated GitHub API deployment history still showed recent GitHub Pages deployments from optimized-v1; verify the GitHub Pages source settings before forcing branch changes.
